## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests pass: `npm test`
- [ ] Typecheck clean: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Lint clean: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Production build clean: `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification on the golden path
- [ ] Keyboard-only traversal has visible focus at every step
- [ ] Tested at 375px width — no horizontal scroll
